center.name: 也门
center.summary: 也门是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联23种鸟类，包括Sand partridge、Arabian partridge、Philby's partridge等23种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It occupies semi-desert and arid grassy plains, as well as Acacia woodlands. It is found in Algeria, Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Chad, Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Guinea-Bissau, Iraq, Kenya, Mali, Mauritania, Morocco, Niger, Nigeria, Saudi Arabia, Senegal, Somalia, Sudan, and Yemen. It is a vagrant to Kenya, Gambia, northern Ivory Coast and northern Ghana. thumb| Ardeotis arabs lynesi - MHNT

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The Arabian golden-winged grosbeak or Arabian grosbeak (Rhynchostruthus percivali) is a finch found in Saudi Arabia, Oman and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: alt=Arabian Partridge at Jebel Hafeet, Al Ain|left|thumb|Arabian Partridge at Jebel Hafeet, Al Ain The Arabian partridge is native to southern Saudi Arabia, Yemen and western Oman

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Sarawat Mountains of western Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Djibouti, Egypt, Eritrea, Israel, Jordan, Oman, Palestine, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, Sudan, and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Oman, Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: | Grainy picture of the Arabian woodpecker perched on a tree branch.]] The Arabian woodpecker (Dendrocoptes dorae) or Sarat woodpecker, is a bird species of the family Picidae, native to the Sarawat Mountains of Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The dusky turtle dove is found in East Africa and South Arabia: Eritrea, Somalia, southern Sudan, Ethiopia, Uganda, Tanzania, Malawi, Burundi, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Yemen (disjunctive population), and southern Saudi Arabia (disjunctive population)

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Asia it is also found in Iran, Iraq, Jordan, Oman, Pakistan, Palestine, Saudi Arabia, Israel, the United Arab Emirates and Yemen.[[File:Journal für Ornithologie (1905) (14747568674).jpg|thumb|{{center|P

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Djibouti, Egypt, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Rwanda, Oman, Saudi Arabia, Somalia, Sudan, Libya, and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Philby's partridge (Alectoris philbyi) or Philby's rock partridge, is a relative of the chukar, red-legged partridge and barbary partridges and is native to southwestern Saudi Arabia and northern Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Sand partridges are endemic across the Middle East. Populations are distributed across Eastern Egypt, Eastern Sudan, Israel, Jordan, Saudi Arabia, Yemen, Oman, and the United Arab Emirates (UAE). The four subspecies of the sand partridge are native to specific parts of the Middle East

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Somalia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: This bird is found in deserts in Israel, Palestine, Jordan, northeastern Egypt (Sinai Peninsula), (NEOM) ([Magna]) , western Saudi Arabia, Yemen, and Oman, nesting mainly on rocky cliff faces

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Oman, Saudi Arabia, and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: There are also populations breeding in Ethiopia and Kenya." It is found in many countries, including: Benin, Burkina Faso, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Ivory Coast, Djibouti, Eritrea, Ethiopia, Gambia, Ghana, Kenya, Liberia, Mali, Mauritania, Niger, Nigeria, Senegal, Somalia, Sudan, Togo, Uganda, and is also found in Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: They are found in tropical Asia from Yemen in the west to the Philippines in the east and move seasonally in parts of their range

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found across large parts of Africa and southern Arabia, from Mauritania through Senegal and the Gambia, east to Ethiopia, Somalia, Yemen, Oman and Saudi Arabia, and south all the way through to South Africa

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: In Arabia it occurs in south-west Saudi Arabia, Yemen and southern Oman

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is native to the Asir Mountains of western Saudi Arabia and Yemen

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: |year=2024 |title=Estrilda rufibarba |volume=2024 |article-number=e.T22719566A263830041 |doi=10.2305/IUCN.UK.2024-2.RLTS.T22719566A263830041.en |access-date=19 June 2025}} | taxon = Estrilda rufibarba | authority = (Cabanis, 1851) }} The Arabian waxbill (Estrilda rufibarba) is a highly sociable species of estrildid finch native to Yemen and south-western Saudi Arabia

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The African palm swift is native to Angola, Benin, Botswana, Burkina Faso, Burundi, Cameroon, Central African Republic, Chad, Congo, Democratic Republic of the Congo, Equatorial Guinea, Eritrea, Eswatini, Ethiopia, Gabon, The Gambia, Ghana, Guinea, Guinea-Bissau, Ivory Coast, Kenya, Liberia, Malawi, Mali, Mauritania, Mayotte, Mozambique, Namibia, Niger, Nigeria, Rwanda, São Tomé and Príncipe, Saudi Arabia, Senegal, Sierra Leone, Somalia, South Africa, South Sudan, Sudan, Tanzania, Togo, Uganda, Yemen, Zambia and Zimbabwe

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Populations also are found in western Angola, southwestern Saudi Arabia and northern Yemen
